name: barops-authority
description: Monorepo for BarOps Authority SaaS demo by Ishakti Labs.

scripts.dev:web: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace @barops/web
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @barops/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @barops/rules-engine && npm run build --workspace @barops/demo-data && npm run build --workspace @barops/report-templates
